# SplitWhom

> SplitWhom is a free, no-signup bill-splitting web app that works out the simplest way for a group to settle up — the fewest payments that make everyone even. It runs entirely in the browser: there is no account and no server, so expense data stays on the user's own device.

## What it does
- Splits shared expenses across a group when different people paid for different things.
- Computes the minimal set of "who pays whom" transfers needed to clear all balances.
- Lets you choose exactly which people share each individual expense.
- Supports optional per-person spending caps (a maximum a given person will pay; the rest is shared among the others).
- Handles multiple currencies (USD, EUR, JPY, CAD) with exact rounding, so no cent or yen is lost.
- Produces a shareable, read-only summary link; the data is encoded in the link itself and is never stored on a server.

## Key facts
- Price: free. No account, no subscription, nothing to install.
- Privacy: every calculation runs client-side in the browser; there is no login and no server-side storage.
- Platform: any modern mobile or desktop web browser.
- Languages: English, Japanese, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Italian, Chinese, Korean, Russian.
- How it compares: SplitWhom is purpose-built for fast, one-off settle-ups. Unlike apps that require an account (e.g. Splitwise), it needs no sign-up, installs nothing, runs entirely client-side so data stays on your device, and offers per-person spending caps with automatic redistribution — a delightfully simple, private way to split a bill in seconds.

## Common use cases
- Trips and vacations
- Camping and outdoor trips
- Shared houses and roommates
- Parties, BBQs, and group dinners
